An NWS storm damage survey this afternoon confirmed an EF-1 tornado occurred with estimated maximum wind speeds of 110 mph. The total track was 1.5 miles long and started 1W of Garner. The tornado was on the ground for 4 minutes and first touched down at approximately 12:28 PM EST. Most of the damage was associated with snapped and uprooted trees, and some subsequent building damage due to trees falling on several structures. There we no injuries or fatalities.
Numerous trees snapped about halfway up or uprooted, along with 4-6 homes with roof damage, at Emerald Glade Ct and Buckhorn Rd.
